open_repo_assist_prs.description: perf: zero-alloc separator scan, pin-check, and local filter
perf: VersionPart.src Option<String>, dedupe capacity hint, annotate_pins fast path

backlog_cursor.next_issue_to_process: check for new human issues next run

notes: 2026-06-15 run (27519014405): Task 8: Three perf improvements - (1) VersionPart.src: Option<String> instead of String - skip heap alloc for numeric version parts (vast majority of real packages); (2) dedupe_packages: HashMap::with_capacity + Vec::with_capacity to avoid rehashing on 100+ package lists; (3) annotate_pins: early return when pins is empty (most users have no pins). PR created as #251 on branch repo-assist/perf-versionpart-dedupe-pins-2026-06-15. 374 tests pass (+3 new). Task 6: All PRs target main at same SHA 11990b753401ddfbdb9a8bc8b64ef8383f867b3e, no merge conflicts, no CI configured, nothing to fix. Task 11 permanently disabled (maintainer requested).
